reason: Successfully navigated to the SuperAgent app, found and clicked the target agent "QA-20260605-185059-3u1r", sent a math question "Hello! What is 2+2?", received the correct response "4", and verified the agent status was "idle" throughout the interaction.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the SuperAgent home screen with sidebar containing two agents

Found "QA-20260605-185059-3u1r" agent in sidebar and clicked it — Agent detail page opened, status indicator showed "idle", and the message input field became active with placeholder text "How can I help?"
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the status indicator (ref=e163)

Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed into input field (ref=e177) and send button clicked (ref=e314). Message successfully submitted and conversation navigated to chat view titled "Math Basics Question Session"

Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent status changed to "working" with activity indicator showing "Working...". Wait completed after approximately 2-3 seconds when the "Working..." text disappeared and status returned to "idle"

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response from agent clearly shows "4" in the chat message (ref=e399). Final screenshot taken showing the complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4"
